environment: clean checkout of the public Crystal Space repository at the recorded crystal-space-master-head commit
legacy-compatible host compiler and dependency set identified from public repository documentation
public/open renderer and plugin dependencies only
public-safe demo or procedural scene inputs
local build transcript and component manifest captured as derived metadata
steps: clone or update the public Crystal Space source repository listed in the artifact record
verify the local checkout commit against the crystal-space-master-head snapshot record
use the SourceForge project record and repository documentation to identify platform, renderer, and dependency expectations
configure the source tree in a clean compatibility environment
compile the engine libraries, plugins, and tools exposed by the public source tree
run a minimal public-safe executable or plugin-load smoke test when available
record build commands, dependency gaps, produced outputs, and compatibility notes as public metadata
public_notes: Planned reproduction recipe for rebuilding Crystal Space from its public source repository and recording legacy dependency assumptions.
